positive: A clean, stylish illustration of a stylized geometric mountain range against a minimalist starry night sky. The design uses highly contrasting deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and warm gold accents. The foreground mountains are rendered in clean, solid silhouettes with sharp edges, reminiscent of Pacific Northwest style. Scattered constellations and nebulae are depicted with elegant, flowing lines and glowing points of light, emphasizing balance and negative space. The composition is centered and scalable, perfect for a central apparel print. Vector art style, highly detailed, symmetrical balance, poster aesthetic, ethereal glow, clean linework.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
